arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim picks two Man Utd stars who 'deserved better' in Wolves defeat
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim was frustrated with his side's ability in front of goal but pleased with two players' performance despite defeat to Wolves in the Premier League

arts.ttl: We lack a lot of things – Ruben Amorim frustrated after Man Utd defeat to Wolves
arts.sum: It was United’s 15th Premier League loss of the season.

arts.ttl: Napoli & Man Utd Contemplate Headline-Making Swap Deal
arts.sum: Juventus could miss out on Victor Osimhen's signature after Manchester United intensified their interest in the Napoli loanee. According to Il Mattino via TuttoJuve, the clubs are considering a high-profile swap deal mutually beneficial for both sides. The post Napoli & Man Utd Contemplate Headline-Making Swap Deal appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford fires warning ahead of Man City return
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continues to feature for Aston Villa following his loan move from Man United.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes move underlines what Ruben Amorim thinks of Man Utd right now
arts.sum: MAN UTD 0-1 WOLVES: A much-changed Manchester United XI slumped to their 15th Premier League defeat of the 2024-25 season, with eight of those coming at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Pereira 'too tired' for a pint as Wolves secure safety
arts.sum: Vitor Pereira, who celebrated last week's 4-2 win over Tottenham in a Wolverhampton pub, says he's "too tired" for a pint this week after his side secure Premier League safety with a 1-0 win against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'Not our best' - Wolves manager rubs salt in Manchester United wounds after Old Trafford win
arts.sum: Wolves won 1-0 against Man Utd after a goal from Pablo Sarabia in the Premier League at Old Trafford on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim addresses his side's "biggest problem" after Wolves defeat
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that a lack of goals is the team's "biggest problem" following Sunday's 1-0 loss to Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim fires warning to his Man United players that it is 'IMPOSSIBLE' to win if they don't fix one key area
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Rasmus Hojlund spurned two glorious opportunities to end his four-month goal drought at Old Trafford, while Bruno Fernandes cut a frustrated figure.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim speaks out on Rasmus Hojlund role amid Manchester United goalscoring struggles
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund has scored eight goals in 45 games for Man United this season and is on a run of one goal in 28 for the club.
